use_cases: Selecting emojis in chat or comment input fields
Adding emoji reactions to messages in real-time collaboration tools
Enabling emoji input in content creation or social media applications
Providing searchable emoji selection in comment systems
Integrating emoji picking functionality into messaging platforms
ai_summary: A Liveblocks-compatible emoji picker component built on Frimousse primitives. This composite component provides a searchable, categorized emoji selection interface with search functionality and keyboard-friendly emoji buttons. Designed for real-time collaborative environments where users need to select and share emoji reactions in chat, comments, or messaging contexts. Renders as a popover-style dropdown with organized emoji categories and active state highlighting.
